field.onConflict: When a name already exists here

action.conflictRename: Import the incoming copy under a new name

message.exportSubtitle: Download a portable .universe package of this world's data and media.
message.importSubtitle: Check a .universe or .json package against this universe, then import it.
message.kitSubtitle: Hand these files to an AI assistant to turn your notes into an importable package.
message.exportPartial: Export ready, but {{ failed }} of {{ total }} media files could not be downloaded. The archive contains their metadata only.
message.exportAllFailed: Export ready, but none of the {{ total }} media files could be downloaded — the archive contains metadata only. This usually means the media bucket's CORS policy does not allow GET requests from this origin.
message.readError: Could not read the file: {{ error }}
message.reportReady: This package is ready to import.
message.reportBlocked: Fix the problems listed below before importing.
message.assetsLine: {{ withBinary }} of {{ total }} media files ({{ size }})
message.calendarApply: This universe has no calendar yet — the package's calendar will be added.
message.categoriesNew: New codex categories to add: {{ count }}.
message.importCounts: Created {{ created }}, renamed {{ renamed }}, skipped {{ skipped }}.
message.importFailed: Some entries could not be written: {{ failed }}. Validate and import again to retry.
